description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a light beige exterior and a dark gray, steeply pitched hip roof. The structure features multiple chimneys, dormer windows, and a prominent glass-enclosed sunroom or veranda on one side, supported by columns. The windows are symmetrically arranged with white frames and shutters, and the main entry doors are painted a muted green. A stone wall partially encloses a side area, possibly for a garden or driveway. The architectural style suggests a late 19th to early 20th-century European influence, with classical detailing and a solid masonry construction.
description: A two-story beige house with a dark hip roof, symmetrical windows, chimneys, and a glass sunroom, featuring classical European architectural details.
description_view_0: Front and left side view showing the main entry doors, symmetrical windows, and the attached glass sunroom with a partial stone wall.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the steep roof, dormer windows, and multiple chimneys, with the side wall and window arrangement visible.
description_view_2: Rear and right side view displaying the plain back wall, additional windows, and the full length of the glass sunroom and stone wall.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the glass sunroom structure, its supporting columns, and the enclosed stone area beneath.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple green door, minimal steps, and no porch, flanked by symmetrically placed windows.
